determinands.name: BMWP Score (River Health)
determinands.description: Biological Monitoring Working Party total. Higher = healthier. Above 100 is good, below 50 is poor.

determinands.name: BMWP Avg Score Per Taxon
determinands.description: Average sensitivity of species found. Above 6 suggests clean water.

determinands.name: BMWP Number of Taxa
determinands.description: Number of invertebrate families found. More diversity = healthier.

determinands.name: WHPT Avg Score Per Taxon
determinands.description: Modern replacement for BMWP. Higher = cleaner water.

determinands.name: WHPT Total Score
determinands.description: Walley Hawkes Paisley Trigg total score. Higher = healthier river.

determinands.name: DEHLI (Headwater Health)
determinands.description: Dragonfly and other headwater species index.
